PF2EShopGenerator.Title: PF2E Shop Generator
PF2EShopGenerator.Settings.OpenHint: Create a PF2E merchant actor and fill it with a random inventory.
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.Title: Generate Merchant Shop
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.CountHint: Use min-max ranges. Example: 1-10, 1-5, or 1 for a fixed count.
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.RatioHint: These Better Merchant ratios apply to the generated buy and sell filters.
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.TagsHint: Comma-separated PF2E item traits, such as magical, alchemical, potion.
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.LabelsHint: Comma-separated text matched against item name, slug, category, and group.
PF2EShopGenerator.Form.ReplaceExisting: Delete an existing merchant actor with the same name first
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.NoPf2e: This module only works while the PF2E system is active.
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.ToolbeltRequire: PF2E Shop Generator requires PF2E Toolbelt with Better Merchant available.
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.NoMatches: No PF2E system items matched the selected filters.
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.ExistingActor: An actor with that name already exists. Enable replacement or choose a new name.
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.FilterSetup: Configured Better Merchant buy and sell filters from the generator settings.
PF2EShopGenerator.Notify.Loading: Loading PF2E item indexes for shop generation...
